reviews.comment:
La calificación es para los empleados (q por el volumen de trabajo son pocos ! ) y trabajan a un ritmo q uno no debe esperar lo lógico equivalente al desfasaje entre clientes y empleados, muy por el contrario uno es muy bien atendido en tiempo y amabilidad

(Translated by Google)
The rating is for the employees (who are few due to the workload!) and they work at a pace that one shouldn't expect, which is logical given the gap between customers and employees; on the contrary, one is very well served in terms of time and friendliness.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3bGV6MFRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Salvo días de recambio de quincena cuando se desborda la concurrencia,  lugar muy bueno, limpio y precios lógicos

(Translated by Google)
Except for peak days when it gets extremely crowded, it's a very good place, clean and reasonably priced.
